title: The Sea Stirs After Dressrosa
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the sea stirs after dressrosa within the The World Prepares for the Reverie storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: Red Line Seafloor, Ryugu Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, I just can't! I'm scared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UFFY Promised me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He said that when we next meet... he'd take me to a real forest on the surface!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Your brothers and the Neptune Army will accompany us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Of course! Luffy could probably take you much further than that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah! We've got plenty of signatures for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yet our destination this time around is merely straight up! All we need to do is float!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If she does not join us, we will appear as if...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This isn't going to work...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Shirahoshi! What did you gain from the straw hats?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Father! Why don't we let Shirahoshi sit this one out- mindo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fukaboshi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The petition for the re- location of the island anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Manbo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We are untrusting of the humans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: of our mother! Of Queen OtoHime!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is quite the pickle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This meeting was the greatest dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let us go together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: else- where, Luffy's party

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A little... to starboard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: OKAY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That good?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Lil'... more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, hey! Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: > Put your backs into it! I wanna see some enthusiasm! We're gonna sink at this rate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quiet, you! Everyone's still on the mend because a certain someone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: thought it'd be cute to freefall from the top of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thank you for that... I've never been more glad to be alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Also, I will remember- her this, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Leave it to me!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: See! Be more like her! She's super cheery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SIGH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've drifted a tiny bit... off course again... a little... to port...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Okey- Dokey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAAAH! We really are floating on the water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: who would have thought...

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: A heavy- looking ship like this could actually float?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the heck are you doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Carrot ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Carrot! You...! Why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I tagged along! :)

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Garchu- usually :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: NAMIII~! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GUEH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KyaH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BARON CORPSE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OW. Bony.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: I'm sorry but... would it be possible to turn the ship around real quick?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't send me back! Wanda's gonna yell at me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you trying to cause trouble for our Saviors, Carrot?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I just really, really wanted to go out to sea on an adventure! Just once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're going to be infuriating a yonkou's strong- hold! This is no game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PLEASE! I'll do any- thing! Just let me go with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look! So that I'm not just a burden, I brought provisions! A carrot bento and carrot juice and a snack! A carrot! And a change of clothes!

summary: The Sea Stirs After Dressrosa: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
